days.headline: A solid day: harbour & wharf is the pick. Top target: Silver trevally (74). Stay off the rocks — swell is at dangerous levels.

environments.name: Rock
environments.tagline: Ledges and headland washes
environments.label: Poor
environments.safety_message: Swell is beyond safe limits for rock platforms today. Stay off the stones — no fish is worth it. Lifejackets are mandatory on many declared NSW rock platforms.
